title: The Woman in White at the Bend: Why This Roadside Legend Still Feels Familiar
metaTitle: The Woman in White at the Bend: Why This Roadside Legend Still Feels Familiar
metaDescription: Explore the woman in white roadside legend, its familiar versions, possible folklore roots, symbolic meaning, and why the story still returns.

title: Hy-Brasil: The Island That Stayed on the Map After It Vanished
metaTitle: Hy-Brasil: The Island That Stayed on the Map After It Vanished

title: The Bell Under the Lake: Why Sunken Bells Keep Ringing in Folklore
metaTitle: The Bell Under the Lake: Why Sunken Bells Keep Ringing in Folklore
metaDescription: Explore the sunken bell folklore motif, why bells beneath water appear in legends, and what these mythic objects often symbolize.
sourceStatus: Folklore motif / Comparative retelling / Unverified tradition
